concepts.name: Speculative Decoding
concepts.description: Master the principle of speculative decoding for accelerating LLM autoregressive inference

concepts.name: KV Cache
concepts.description: Master the KV Cache mechanism in autoregressive generation and its optimization strategies

concepts.name: RoPE Rotary Position Embedding
concepts.description: Master the mathematical principles of RoPE and its application in long-context LLMs

concepts.name: FlashAttention
concepts.description: Master the IO-aware algorithm design and memory optimization principles of FlashAttention

concepts.name: Model Distillation
concepts.description: Master knowledge distillation techniques for transferring large model capabilities to smaller models

concepts.name: LLM Safety and Alignment
concepts.description: Master LLM safety evaluation, red teaming, and alignment methods

concepts.name: Embedding Models
concepts.description: Master embedding model architectures, training methods, and domain-specific fine-tuning

concepts.name: Function Calling
concepts.description: Master the LLM function calling mechanism and implementation patterns

concepts.name: LLM Benchmarks (MMLU/HumanEval)
concepts.description: Master the methodology and limitations of mainstream LLM evaluation benchmarks

concepts.name: LLM Serving (vLLM/TGI)
concepts.description: Master high-performance LLM serving deployment frameworks and optimization strategies

concepts.name: Agent Frameworks Comparison
concepts.description: Master design philosophies, trade-offs, and selection principles of mainstream Agent frameworks

concepts.name: Agent Debugging and Observability
concepts.description: Master debugging tools, trace analysis, and observability best practices for Agent systems

concepts.name: Graph RAG
concepts.description: Master the Graph RAG architecture combining knowledge graphs with RAG and community summarization methods

concepts.name: HyDE Retrieval
concepts.description: Master how HyDE generates hypothetical documents to enhance retrieval effectiveness

concepts.name: Reranking
concepts.description: Master post-retrieval reranking techniques to improve RAG generation quality

concepts.name: LLM幻觉与事实性
concepts.description: 理解大语言模型幻觉产生的原因、检测方法和缓解策略

concepts.name: 模型合并
concepts.description: 掌握模型合并技术(SLERP/TIES/DARE)及其在开源LLM社区的应用

concepts.name: 持续预训练
concepts.description: 理解如何在已有基座模型上继续预训练以适配特定领域知识

concepts.name: 稀疏注意力
concepts.description: 掌握稀疏注意力机制(Longformer/BigBird等)突破序列长度限制的方法

concepts.name: LLM水印技术
concepts.description: 理解LLM生成文本的水印嵌入与检测技术, 用于AI生成内容溯源

concepts.name: Agent反思机制
concepts.description: 掌握Agent的自我反思(Reflexion)和自我纠错能力的实现方法

concepts.name: Agent工具创造
concepts.description: 理解Agent自主创建和优化工具的能力(LATM/CREATOR等框架)

concepts.name: Agent评测基准
concepts.description: 了解主流Agent评测基准(SWE-bench/WebArena/AgentBench)的设计与使用

concepts.name: Agent安全护栏
concepts.description: 掌握Agent行为约束和安全控制机制的设计与实现

concepts.name: Agent工作流编排
concepts.description: 理解LLM Agent工作流的DAG编排、条件分支和并行执行模式

concepts.name: RAG查询路由
concepts.description: 掌握RAG系统中智能查询路由策略, 将查询分发到最合适的检索源

concepts.name: RAG缓存策略
concepts.description: 理解RAG系统的语义缓存和结果缓存技术以提升响应速度和降低成本

concepts.name: 上下文压缩
concepts.description: 掌握检索后上下文压缩技术, 提取与查询最相关的文档片段

concepts.name: 元提示工程
concepts.description: 掌握使用LLM生成和优化提示词的元提示技术(Meta-Prompting/APE)

concepts.name: 提示链
concepts.description: 掌握将复杂任务拆分为多步提示链的设计方法和实现模式

concepts.name: A*搜索算法
concepts.description: 掌握A*搜索算法的原理、启发式函数设计及在路径规划中的应用

concepts.name: 单调栈
concepts.description: 掌握单调栈的原理和典型应用场景(下一个更大元素/柱状图最大矩形等)

concepts.name: 前缀和
concepts.description: 掌握一维和二维前缀和的原理及在区间查询中的高效应用

concepts.name: KMP算法
concepts.description: 深入理解KMP字符串匹配算法的next数组构建和匹配过程

concepts.name: 最小生成树
concepts.description: 理解Prim和Kruskal两种最小生成树算法的原理和适用场景

concepts.name: 线段树
concepts.description: 掌握线段树的构建、区间查询和区间更新操作及懒标记优化

concepts.name: B树与B+树
concepts.description: 理解B树和B+树的结构特性及其在数据库索引中的核心应用

concepts.name: LRU缓存
concepts.description: 掌握LRU缓存的设计与实现(哈希表+双向链表O(1)操作)

concepts.name: 树状数组
concepts.description: 掌握树状数组(Binary Indexed Tree)的原理和前缀和/区间更新应用

concepts.name: 稀疏表
concepts.description: 理解稀疏表的预处理和O(1)区间最值查询(RMQ问题)

concepts.name: 强化学习基础
concepts.description: 理解强化学习的核心概念(MDP/策略/值函数/Q-learning/策略梯度)

concepts.name: 生成对抗网络
concepts.description: 掌握GAN的对抗训练原理、常见变体(DCGAN/StyleGAN)和应用场景

concepts.name: 自编码器
concepts.description: 理解自编码器(AE/VAE/Denoising AE)的编码-解码架构和应用

concepts.name: 迁移学习
concepts.description: 掌握迁移学习的原理和实践(预训练-微调范式/领域适应)

concepts.name: 注意力机制基础
concepts.description: 理解注意力机制从Seq2Seq到Self-Attention的演进和数学原理
